title: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
description: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
code_snippet:
422         main_query = f"""
423         WITH export_data AS (
424             -- ERC20 Transfers from multisigtransactions
425             SELECT
426                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
427                 encode(erc20._from, 'hex') as from_address,
428                 encode(erc20.to, 'hex') as to_address,
429                 erc20.value::text as amount,
430                 'erc20' as asset_type,
431                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
432                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
433                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
434                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
435                 mt.created as proposed_at,
436                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
437                 erc20.timestamp as execution_date,
438                 erc20.timestamp as executed_at,
439                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
440                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
441                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
442                 null as method,
443                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
444                 COALESCE(erc20.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
445             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
446             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
447             JOIN history_erc20transfer erc20 ON et.tx_hash = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
448             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
449             WHERE mt.safe = %s
450 
451             UNION ALL
452 
453             -- ERC20 Transfers (standalone) incoming, or outgoing with token approval
454             SELECT
455                 encode(CASE
456                     WHEN erc20.to = %s THEN erc20.to
457                     ELSE erc20._from
458                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
459                 encode(erc20._from, 'hex') as from_address,
460                 encode(erc20.to, 'hex') as to_address,
461                 erc20.value::text as amount,
462                 'erc20' as asset_type,
463                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
464                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
465                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
466                 null as proposer_address,
467                 null as proposed_at,
468                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
469                 erc20.timestamp as execution_date,
470                 erc20.timestamp as executed_at,
471                 '' as note,
472                 encode(erc20.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
473                 null as safe_tx_hash,
474                 null as method,
475                 null as contract_address,
476                 erc20.timestamp as sort_date
477             FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
478             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON erc20.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
479             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
480             WHERE (erc20.to = %s OR erc20._from = %s)
481             AND NOT EXISTS (
482                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
483                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
484             )
485             AND NOT EXISTS (
486                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
487                 JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
488                 WHERE itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
489             )
490 
491             UNION ALL
492 
493             -- Multisig Transactions with ERC721 Transfers
494             SELECT
495                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
496                 encode(erc721._from, 'hex') as from_address,
497                 encode(erc721.to, 'hex') as to_address,
498                 erc721.token_id::text as amount,
499                 'erc721' as asset_type,
500                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
501                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
502                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
503                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
504                 mt.created as proposed_at,
505                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
506                 erc721.timestamp as execution_date,
507                 erc721.timestamp as executed_at,
508                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
509                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
510                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
511                 null as method,
512                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
513                 COALESCE(erc721.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
514             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
515             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
516             JOIN history_erc721transfer erc721 ON et.tx_hash = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
517             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
518             WHERE mt.safe = %s
519 
520             UNION ALL
521 
522             -- Multisig Transactions (standalone, without transfers)
523             SELECT
524                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
525                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as from_address,
526                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as to_address,
527                 itx.value::text as amount,
528                 'native' as asset_type,
529                 null as asset_address,
530                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
531                 18 as asset_decimals,
532                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
533                 mt.created as proposed_at,
534                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
535                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
536                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
537                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
538                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
539                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
540                 null as method,
541                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
542                 COALESCE(itx.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
543             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
544             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
545             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
546             WHERE mt.safe = %s
547             AND itx.call_type = 0  -- CALL
548             AND itx.value > 0
549             AND NOT EXISTS (
550                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
551                 WHERE erc20.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
552             )
553             AND NOT EXISTS (
554                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
555                 WHERE erc721.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
556             )
557 
558             UNION ALL
559 
560             -- Module Transactions with ERC20 Transfers
561             SELECT
562                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
563                 encode(COALESCE(erc20._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
564                 encode(COALESCE(erc20.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
565                 COALESCE(erc20.value::text, modtx.value::text) as amount,
566                 CASE
567                     WHEN erc20.address IS NOT NULL THEN 'erc20'
568                     ELSE 'native'
569                 END as asset_type,
570                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
571                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
572                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
573                 null as proposer_address,
574                 null as proposed_at,
575                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
576                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
577                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
578                 '' as note,
579                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
580                 null as safe_tx_hash,
581                 null as method,
582                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
583                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
584             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
585             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
586             JOIN history_erc20transfer erc20 ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
587             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
588             WHERE modtx.safe = %s
589 
590             UNION ALL
591 
592             -- Module Transactions with ERC721 Transfers
593             SELECT
594                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
595                 encode(COALESCE(erc721._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
596                 encode(COALESCE(erc721.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
597                 COALESCE(erc721.token_id::text, modtx.value::text) as amount,
598                 CASE
599                     WHEN erc721.address IS NOT NULL THEN 'erc721'
600                     ELSE 'native'
601                 END as asset_type,
602                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
603                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
604                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
605                 null as proposer_address,
606                 null as proposed_at,
607                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
608                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
609                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
610                 '' as note,
611                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
612                 null as safe_tx_hash,
613                 null as method,
614                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
615                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
616             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
617             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
618             JOIN history_erc721transfer erc721 ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
619             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
620             WHERE modtx.safe = %s
621 
622             UNION ALL
623 
624             -- Module Transactions with ethereum Transfers
625             SELECT
626                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
627                 encode(COALESCE(itx._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
628                 encode(COALESCE(itx.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
629                 itx.value::text as amount,
630                'native' as asset_type,
631                 null as asset_address,
632                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
633                 18 as asset_decimals,
634                 null as proposer_address,
635                 null as proposed_at,
636                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
637                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
638                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
639                 '' as note,
640                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
641                 null as safe_tx_hash,
642                 null as method,
643                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
644                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
645             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
646             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
647             WHERE itx.to = %s OR itx._from = %s and itx.value > 0
648             AND NOT EXISTS (
649                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
650                 WHERE erc20.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
651             )
652             AND NOT EXISTS (
653                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
654                 WHERE erc721.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
655             )
656 
657             UNION ALL
658 
659             -- ERC721 Transfers (standalone)
660             SELECT
661                 encode(CASE
662                     WHEN erc721.to = %s THEN erc721.to
663                     ELSE erc721._from
664                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
665                 encode(erc721._from, 'hex') as from_address,
666                 encode(erc721.to, 'hex') as to_address,
667                 erc721.token_id::text as amount,
668                 'erc721' as asset_type,
669                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
670                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
671                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
672                 null as proposer_address,
673                 null as proposed_at,
674                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
675                 erc721.timestamp as execution_date,
676                 erc721.timestamp as executed_at,
677                 '' as note,
678                 encode(erc721.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
679                 null as safe_tx_hash,
680                 null as method,
681                 null as contract_address,
682                 erc721.timestamp as sort_date
683             FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
684             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON erc721.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
685             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
686             WHERE (erc721.to = %s OR erc721._from = %s)
687             AND NOT EXISTS (
688                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
689                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
690             )
691             AND NOT EXISTS (
692                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
693                 JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
694                 WHERE itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
695             )
696 
697             UNION ALL
698 
699             -- Ether Transfers (InternalTx)
700             SELECT
701                 encode(CASE
702                     WHEN itx.to = %s THEN itx.to
703                     ELSE itx._from
704                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
705                 encode(itx._from, 'hex') as from_address,
706                 encode(itx.to, 'hex') as to_address,
707                 itx.value::text as amount,
708                 'native' as asset_type,
709                 null as asset_address,
710                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
711                 18 as asset_decimals,
712                 null as proposer_address,
713                 null as proposed_at,
714                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
715                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
716                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
717                 '' as note,
718                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
719                 null as safe_tx_hash,
720                 null as method,
721                 null as contract_address,
722                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
723             FROM history_internaltx itx
724             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
725             WHERE (itx.to = %s OR itx._from = %s)
726             AND itx.call_type = 0  -- CALL
727             AND itx.value > 0
728             AND NOT EXISTS (
729                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
730                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
731             )
732             AND NOT EXISTS (
733                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
734                 JOIN history_internaltx itx2 ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx2.id
735                 WHERE itx2.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
736             )
737         )
738         SELECT
739             safe_address,
740             from_address,
741             to_address,
742             amount,
743             asset_type,
744             asset_address,
745             asset_symbol,
746             asset_decimals,
747             proposer_address,
748             proposed_at,
749             executor_address,
750             execution_date,
751             executed_at,
752             note,
753             transaction_hash,
754             safe_tx_hash,
755             method,
756             contract_address
757         FROM export_data
758         WHERE {where_clause}
759         ORDER BY execution_date DESC, transaction_hash
760         LIMIT %s OFFSET %s
761         """

raw_data.code:
422         main_query = f"""
423         WITH export_data AS (
424             -- ERC20 Transfers from multisigtransactions
425             SELECT
426                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
427                 encode(erc20._from, 'hex') as from_address,
428                 encode(erc20.to, 'hex') as to_address,
429                 erc20.value::text as amount,
430                 'erc20' as asset_type,
431                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
432                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
433                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
434                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
435                 mt.created as proposed_at,
436                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
437                 erc20.timestamp as execution_date,
438                 erc20.timestamp as executed_at,
439                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
440                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
441                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
442                 null as method,
443                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
444                 COALESCE(erc20.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
445             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
446             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
447             JOIN history_erc20transfer erc20 ON et.tx_hash = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
448             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
449             WHERE mt.safe = %s
450 
451             UNION ALL
452 
453             -- ERC20 Transfers (standalone) incoming, or outgoing with token approval
454             SELECT
455                 encode(CASE
456                     WHEN erc20.to = %s THEN erc20.to
457                     ELSE erc20._from
458                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
459                 encode(erc20._from, 'hex') as from_address,
460                 encode(erc20.to, 'hex') as to_address,
461                 erc20.value::text as amount,
462                 'erc20' as asset_type,
463                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
464                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
465                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
466                 null as proposer_address,
467                 null as proposed_at,
468                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
469                 erc20.timestamp as execution_date,
470                 erc20.timestamp as executed_at,
471                 '' as note,
472                 encode(erc20.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
473                 null as safe_tx_hash,
474                 null as method,
475                 null as contract_address,
476                 erc20.timestamp as sort_date
477             FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
478             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON erc20.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
479             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
480             WHERE (erc20.to = %s OR erc20._from = %s)
481             AND NOT EXISTS (
482                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
483                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
484             )
485             AND NOT EXISTS (
486                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
487                 JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
488                 WHERE itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
489             )
490 
491             UNION ALL
492 
493             -- Multisig Transactions with ERC721 Transfers
494             SELECT
495                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
496                 encode(erc721._from, 'hex') as from_address,
497                 encode(erc721.to, 'hex') as to_address,
498                 erc721.token_id::text as amount,
499                 'erc721' as asset_type,
500                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
501                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
502                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
503                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
504                 mt.created as proposed_at,
505                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
506                 erc721.timestamp as execution_date,
507                 erc721.timestamp as executed_at,
508                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
509                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
510                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
511                 null as method,
512                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
513                 COALESCE(erc721.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
514             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
515             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
516             JOIN history_erc721transfer erc721 ON et.tx_hash = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
517             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
518             WHERE mt.safe = %s
519 
520             UNION ALL
521 
522             -- Multisig Transactions (standalone, without transfers)
523             SELECT
524                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
525                 encode(mt.safe, 'hex') as from_address,
526                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as to_address,
527                 itx.value::text as amount,
528                 'native' as asset_type,
529                 null as asset_address,
530                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
531                 18 as asset_decimals,
532                 encode(mt.proposer, 'hex') as proposer_address,
533                 mt.created as proposed_at,
534                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
535                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
536                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
537                 COALESCE(mt.origin->>'note', '') as note,
538                 encode(mt.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
539                 encode(mt.safe_tx_hash, 'hex') as safe_tx_hash,
540                 null as method,
541                 encode(mt.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
542                 COALESCE(itx.timestamp, mt.created) as sort_date
543             FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
544             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON mt.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
545             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
546             WHERE mt.safe = %s
547             AND itx.call_type = 0  -- CALL
548             AND itx.value > 0
549             AND NOT EXISTS (
550                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
551                 WHERE erc20.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
552             )
553             AND NOT EXISTS (
554                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
555                 WHERE erc721.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
556             )
557 
558             UNION ALL
559 
560             -- Module Transactions with ERC20 Transfers
561             SELECT
562                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
563                 encode(COALESCE(erc20._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
564                 encode(COALESCE(erc20.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
565                 COALESCE(erc20.value::text, modtx.value::text) as amount,
566                 CASE
567                     WHEN erc20.address IS NOT NULL THEN 'erc20'
568                     ELSE 'native'
569                 END as asset_type,
570                 encode(erc20.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
571                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
572                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
573                 null as proposer_address,
574                 null as proposed_at,
575                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
576                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
577                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
578                 '' as note,
579                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
580                 null as safe_tx_hash,
581                 null as method,
582                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
583                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
584             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
585             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
586             JOIN history_erc20transfer erc20 ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc20.ethereum_tx_id
587             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc20.address = t.address
588             WHERE modtx.safe = %s
589 
590             UNION ALL
591 
592             -- Module Transactions with ERC721 Transfers
593             SELECT
594                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
595                 encode(COALESCE(erc721._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
596                 encode(COALESCE(erc721.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
597                 COALESCE(erc721.token_id::text, modtx.value::text) as amount,
598                 CASE
599                     WHEN erc721.address IS NOT NULL THEN 'erc721'
600                     ELSE 'native'
601                 END as asset_type,
602                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
603                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
604                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
605                 null as proposer_address,
606                 null as proposed_at,
607                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
608                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
609                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
610                 '' as note,
611                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
612                 null as safe_tx_hash,
613                 null as method,
614                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
615                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
616             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
617             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
618             JOIN history_erc721transfer erc721 ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
619             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
620             WHERE modtx.safe = %s
621 
622             UNION ALL
623 
624             -- Module Transactions with ethereum Transfers
625             SELECT
626                 encode(modtx.safe, 'hex') as safe_address,
627                 encode(COALESCE(itx._from, modtx.module), 'hex') as from_address,
628                 encode(COALESCE(itx.to, modtx.to), 'hex') as to_address,
629                 itx.value::text as amount,
630                'native' as asset_type,
631                 null as asset_address,
632                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
633                 18 as asset_decimals,
634                 null as proposer_address,
635                 null as proposed_at,
636                 encode(modtx.module, 'hex') as executor_address,
637                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
638                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
639                 '' as note,
640                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
641                 null as safe_tx_hash,
642                 null as method,
643                 encode(modtx.to, 'hex') as contract_address,
644                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
645             FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
646             JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
647             WHERE itx.to = %s OR itx._from = %s and itx.value > 0
648             AND NOT EXISTS (
649                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc20transfer erc20
650                 WHERE erc20.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
651             )
652             AND NOT EXISTS (
653                 SELECT 1 FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
654                 WHERE erc721.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
655             )
656 
657             UNION ALL
658 
659             -- ERC721 Transfers (standalone)
660             SELECT
661                 encode(CASE
662                     WHEN erc721.to = %s THEN erc721.to
663                     ELSE erc721._from
664                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
665                 encode(erc721._from, 'hex') as from_address,
666                 encode(erc721.to, 'hex') as to_address,
667                 erc721.token_id::text as amount,
668                 'erc721' as asset_type,
669                 encode(erc721.address, 'hex') as asset_address,
670                 t.symbol as asset_symbol,
671                 t.decimals as asset_decimals,
672                 null as proposer_address,
673                 null as proposed_at,
674                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
675                 erc721.timestamp as execution_date,
676                 erc721.timestamp as executed_at,
677                 '' as note,
678                 encode(erc721.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
679                 null as safe_tx_hash,
680                 null as method,
681                 null as contract_address,
682                 erc721.timestamp as sort_date
683             FROM history_erc721transfer erc721
684             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON erc721.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
685             LEFT JOIN tokens_token t ON erc721.address = t.address
686             WHERE (erc721.to = %s OR erc721._from = %s)
687             AND NOT EXISTS (
688                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
689                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
690             )
691             AND NOT EXISTS (
692                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
693                 JOIN history_internaltx itx ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx.id
694                 WHERE itx.ethereum_tx_id = erc721.ethereum_tx_id
695             )
696 
697             UNION ALL
698 
699             -- Ether Transfers (InternalTx)
700             SELECT
701                 encode(CASE
702                     WHEN itx.to = %s THEN itx.to
703                     ELSE itx._from
704                 END, 'hex') as safe_address,
705                 encode(itx._from, 'hex') as from_address,
706                 encode(itx.to, 'hex') as to_address,
707                 itx.value::text as amount,
708                 'native' as asset_type,
709                 null as asset_address,
710                 'ETH' as asset_symbol,
711                 18 as asset_decimals,
712                 null as proposer_address,
713                 null as proposed_at,
714                 encode(et._from, 'hex') as executor_address,
715                 itx.timestamp as execution_date,
716                 itx.timestamp as executed_at,
717                 '' as note,
718                 encode(itx.ethereum_tx_id, 'hex') as transaction_hash,
719                 null as safe_tx_hash,
720                 null as method,
721                 null as contract_address,
722                 itx.timestamp as sort_date
723             FROM history_internaltx itx
724             JOIN history_ethereumtx et ON itx.ethereum_tx_id = et.tx_hash
725             WHERE (itx.to = %s OR itx._from = %s)
726             AND itx.call_type = 0  -- CALL
727             AND itx.value > 0
728             AND NOT EXISTS (
729                 SELECT 1 FROM history_multisigtransaction mt
730                 WHERE mt.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
731             )
732             AND NOT EXISTS (
733                 SELECT 1 FROM history_moduletransaction modtx
734                 JOIN history_internaltx itx2 ON modtx.internal_tx_id = itx2.id
735                 WHERE itx2.ethereum_tx_id = itx.ethereum_tx_id
736             )
737         )
738         SELECT
739             safe_address,
740             from_address,
741             to_address,
742             amount,
743             asset_type,
744             asset_address,
745             asset_symbol,
746             asset_decimals,
747             proposer_address,
748             proposed_at,
749             executor_address,
750             execution_date,
751             executed_at,
752             note,
753             transaction_hash,
754             safe_tx_hash,
755             method,
756             contract_address
757         FROM export_data
758         WHERE {where_clause}
759         ORDER BY execution_date DESC, transaction_hash
760         LIMIT %s OFFSET %s
761         """
raw_data.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

raw_data.Message:
Fix duplicate notifications (#1483)

- Use md5 hash of the payload instead of the payload
- Increase cache expiration time from 5 minutes to 2 hours
- Optimize redis check, so only one query is needed (by using SETNX)
- Refactor classes and tests
- Check for duplicated notifications at the beginning of the task
- Notifications will be always inserted on redis when checking them
- Add environment variable to configure expiration time for notifications

raw_data.Message:
Calculate token fiat prices using celery (#225)

- Move price calculation to Celery, instead of blocking the web worker.
- If prices are not available, return `0`.
- Update dependencies.
- Remove Kyber/Uniswap addresses from configuration, as `gnosis-py` has them stored for every network.
- Create new price service and add tests
- Refactor balance service

* Closes #90

* Use batches for ERC721 retrieval
* Add tests
* Update dependencies
* Support crypto kitties and ENS
* Use redis for caching

title: django: Django SQL injection
description:
An issue was discovered in 5.1 before 5.1.14, 4.2 before 4.2.26, and 5.2 before 5.2.8.
The methods `QuerySet.filter()`, `QuerySet.exclude()`, and `QuerySet.get()`, and the class `Q()`, are subject to SQL injection when using a suitably crafted dictionary, with dictionary expansion, as the `_connector` argument.
Earlier, unsupported Django series (such as 5.0.x, 4.1.x, and 3.2.x) were not evaluated and may also be affected.
Django would like to thank cyberstan for reporting this issue.

raw_data.Description:
An issue was discovered in 5.1 before 5.1.14, 4.2 before 4.2.26, and 5.2 before 5.2.8.
The methods `QuerySet.filter()`, `QuerySet.exclude()`, and `QuerySet.get()`, and the class `Q()`, are subject to SQL injection when using a suitably crafted dictionary, with dictionary expansion, as the `_connector` argument.
Earlier, unsupported Django series (such as 5.0.x, 4.1.x, and 3.2.x) were not evaluated and may also be affected.
Django would like to thank cyberstan for reporting this issue.
raw_data.Title: django: Django SQL injection

title: django: Django SQL injection in FilteredRelation column aliases
description: An issue was discovered in Django 4.2 before 4.2.24, 5.1 before 5.1.12, and 5.2 before 5.2.6. FilteredRelation is subject to SQL injection in column aliases, using a suitably crafted dictionary, with dictionary expansion, as the **kwargs passed QuerySet.annotate() or QuerySet.alias().

raw_data.Description: An issue was discovered in Django 4.2 before 4.2.24, 5.1 before 5.1.12, and 5.2 before 5.2.6. FilteredRelation is subject to SQL injection in column aliases, using a suitably crafted dictionary, with dictionary expansion, as the **kwargs passed QuerySet.annotate() or QuerySet.alias().
raw_data.Title: django: Django SQL injection in FilteredRelation column aliases

title: Django: Denial-of-service vulnerability in Django on Windows
description:
An issue was discovered in 5.1 before 5.1.14, 4.2 before 4.2.26, and 5.2 before 5.2.8.
NFKC normalization in Python is slow on Windows. As a consequence, `django.http.HttpResponseRedirect`, `django.http.HttpResponsePermanentRedirect`, and the shortcut `django.shortcuts.redirect`  were subject to a potential  denial-of-service attack via certain inputs with a very large number of Unicode characters.
Earlier, unsupported Django series (such as 5.0.x, 4.1.x, and 3.2.x) were not evaluated and may also be affected.
Django would like to thank Seokchan Yoon for reporting this issue.

raw_data.Description:
An issue was discovered in 5.1 before 5.1.14, 4.2 before 4.2.26, and 5.2 before 5.2.8.
NFKC normalization in Python is slow on Windows. As a consequence, `django.http.HttpResponseRedirect`, `django.http.HttpResponsePermanentRedirect`, and the shortcut `django.shortcuts.redirect`  were subject to a potential  denial-of-service attack via certain inputs with a very large number of Unicode characters.
Earlier, unsupported Django series (such as 5.0.x, 4.1.x, and 3.2.x) were not evaluated and may also be affected.
Django would like to thank Seokchan Yoon for reporting this issue.
raw_data.Title: Django: Denial-of-service vulnerability in Django on Windows

title: django: Django DoS Unicode Attack
description: An issue was discovered in Django 5.1 before 5.1.8 and 5.0 before 5.0.14. The NFKC normalization is slow on Windows. As a consequence, django.contrib.auth.views.LoginView, django.contrib.auth.views.LogoutView, and django.views.i18n.set_language are subject to a potential denial-of-service attack via certain inputs with a very large number of Unicode characters.

raw_data.Description: An issue was discovered in Django 5.1 before 5.1.8 and 5.0 before 5.0.14. The NFKC normalization is slow on Windows. As a consequence, django.contrib.auth.views.LoginView, django.contrib.auth.views.LogoutView, and django.views.i18n.set_language are subject to a potential denial-of-service attack via certain inputs with a very large number of Unicode characters.
raw_data.Title: django: Django DoS Unicode Attack

title: django: Django Path Injection Vulnerability
description: An issue was discovered in Django 5.2 before 5.2.3, 5.1 before 5.1.11, and 4.2 before 4.2.23. Internal HTTP response logging does not escape request.path, which allows remote attackers to potentially manipulate log output via crafted URLs. This may lead to log injection or forgery when logs are viewed in terminals or processed by external systems.

raw_data.Description: An issue was discovered in Django 5.2 before 5.2.3, 5.1 before 5.1.11, and 4.2 before 4.2.23. Internal HTTP response logging does not escape request.path, which allows remote attackers to potentially manipulate log output via crafted URLs. This may lead to log injection or forgery when logs are viewed in terminals or processed by external systems.
raw_data.Title: django: Django Path Injection Vulnerability
